prompt: /start — but I already did this onboarding before. My profile is saved.
assertions: Response does NOT re-ask the dream project question as if this is the first time
Response acknowledges that the user may have already been onboarded
Response either checks memory or asks if they want to jump straight to the first lesson
Response is brief — does not re-explain the onboarding process
Response does NOT assume the user wants to redo onboarding from scratch
